Description
BukkitWorldParser
Parser for Bukkit worlds.

Manages the plugin's commands and their registration.

Manages the configuration files for the SlimeWorldManager plugin.
CreateWorldCmd
Command to create a new Slime world.

Configuration for data sources.

Configuration for API-based storage.

Command to delete a Slime world.
DSListCmd
Command to list worlds in a data source.
